category_sources: source_facts.description says Haraka is a fast, highly extensible, event-driven SMTP server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official haraka.github.io site and source_facts.source-archive uses the Haraka package name.
docs_sources: Official haraka.github.io site is the primary documentation surface; official GitHub README is an additional project documentation source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Haraka site and package metadata identify github.com/haraka/Haraka as the upstream source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an extensible SMTP server; source_facts.executables lists haraka command-line tools.
